typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        Month as string,
        Sunday as string,
        Monday as string,
        Tuesday as string,
        Wednesday as string,
        Thrusday as string,
        Friday as string,
        Saturday as string
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> Flat_File_Source
Flat_File_Source derive(/* TODO: add expressions */) ~> Unpivot
